descriptionText: Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49 For Sale 2007 | Guest Cabins:3 | Tax PaidThe Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49 For Sale 2007 is a well‑regarded blue‑water cruiser designed by Philippe Briand, known for combining comfortable live‑aboard qualities with capable sailing performance. This particular 2007 model, under the Italian flag and currently visible in Campania, has been well looked after throughout her life. With three owners from new and regular maintenance, she presents today in good condition both inside and out.(Bimini, Autopilot, Battery Charger, Liferaft)Specifications: • Builder: Jeanneau • Model: Sun Odyssey 49 • Designer: Philippe Briand • Flag: Italian • Year: 2007 • LOA: 14.98 m • Beam: 4.49 m • Draft: 2.15 m • Displacement: 17,650 kg • Owners: 3 • Registration: Registered • Safety Certificate Expiry: 03/2027 • Capacity: A10 / B12 / C14 • Location: CampaniaDeck and Hull • White GRP hull • Teak coachroof, side decks and cockpit • New cushions (2024) • Sprayhood 2024 • Bimini 2025 • VTR cockpit table • Full winter cover • Cast iron fin keelInterior • 3 double cabins • 3 electric heads • 3 showers • Teak interior • 4‑burner stove • Oven • Fridge • Pedal pump • White leather upholsteryEngine • Yanmar 4JH4‑HTE 110 hp • Hours: 1800 (Jan 2026) • Fuel tank: 240 L • Shaft drive • Gori overdrive propeller • Bow thruster • Seacocks replaced 2021Electronics • Autopilot • VHF • Echo • Log • Tridata • 2 compasses • Stereo • Raymarine plotter with AIS (2022) • Wind instrumentsSystems • 12/220V • 6 batteries • Total 400 Ah • 3 water tanks (720 L total) • Electric & manual bilge pumps • Battery charger • Boiler • Freshwater pump • Black water system • External shower • Mase 2.6 kW generator (150 h, serviced 2025)Rig and Sails • Aluminium mast 9/10 • Carbon bowsprit • Aluminium spinnaker pole • 4 winches (1 electric) • Antal winches • Lazy bag 2023 • Vang • Adjustable backstay • Furling system • Sails 2023: mainsail 50 m², genoa 65 m², Code 0 100 m²Mooring & Safety • Tender 3.10 m • Torqeedo outboard (optional) • Windlass • 30 kg anchor • 100 m chain • Liferaft 6‑person (exp. 05/2026) • 8 fendersThis Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49 For Sale 2007 is a well‑maintained and upgraded cruising yacht, offering a comfortable three‑cabin layout, strong sailing performance and reliable systems throughout. descriptionHtml:
Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49 For Sale 2007 | Guest Cabins:3 | Tax Paid

The Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49 For Sale 2007 is a well‑regarded blue‑water cruiser designed by Philippe Briand, known for combining comfortable live‑aboard qualities with capable sailing performance. This particular 2007 model, under the Italian flag and currently visible in Campania, has been well looked after throughout her life. With three owners from new and regular maintenance, she presents today in good condition both inside and out.

(Bimini, Autopilot, Battery Charger, Liferaft)

Specifications:
• Builder: Jeanneau
• Model: Sun Odyssey 49
• Designer: Philippe Briand
• Flag: Italian
• Year: 2007
• LOA: 14.98 m
• Beam: 4.49 m
• Draft: 2.15 m
• Displacement: 17,650 kg
• Owners: 3
• Registration: Registered
• Safety Certificate Expiry: 03/2027
• Capacity: A10 / B12 / C14
• Location: Campania

Deck and Hull
• White GRP hull
• Teak coachroof, side decks and cockpit
• New cushions (2024)
• Sprayhood 2024
• Bimini 2025
• VTR cockpit table
• Full winter cover
• Cast iron fin keel

Interior
• 3 double cabins
• 3 electric heads
• 3 showers
• Teak interior
• 4‑burner stove
• Oven
• Fridge
• Pedal pump
• White leather upholstery

Engine
• Yanmar 4JH4‑HTE 110 hp
• Hours: 1800 (Jan 2026)
• Fuel tank: 240 L
• Shaft drive
• Gori overdrive propeller
• Bow thruster
• Seacocks replaced 2021

Electronics
• Autopilot
• VHF
• Echo
• Log
• Tridata
• 2 compasses
• Stereo
• Raymarine plotter with AIS (2022)
• Wind instruments

Systems
• 12/220V
• 6 batteries
• Total 400 Ah
• 3 water tanks (720 L total)
• Electric & manual bilge pumps
• Battery charger
• Boiler
• Freshwater pump
• Black water system
• External shower
• Mase 2.6 kW generator (150 h, serviced 2025)

Rig and Sails
• Aluminium mast 9/10
• Carbon bowsprit
• Aluminium spinnaker pole
• 4 winches (1 electric)
• Antal winches
• Lazy bag 2023
• Vang
• Adjustable backstay
• Furling system
• Sails 2023: mainsail 50 m², genoa 65 m², Code 0 100 m²

Mooring & Safety
• Tender 3.10 m
• Torqeedo outboard (optional)
• Windlass
• 30 kg anchor
• 100 m chain
• Liferaft 6‑person (exp. 05/2026)
• 8 fenders

This Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 49 For Sale 2007 is a well‑maintained and upgraded cruising yacht, offering a comfortable three‑cabin layout, strong sailing performance and reliable systems throughout. With recent updates and quality equipment already in place, it is ready for enjoyable coastal or offshore cruising and represents solid value for anyone seeking a dependable, spacious sailboat in very good condition.
